top_signals.title: Saudi Crude Supply to China Remain at Record Low in July
top_signals.summary: Saudi Arabia's crude oil sales to China are expected to stay at record lows in July as elevated prices in the wake of the U.S.-Israeli war on Iran continue to weigh on demand from the world's largest crude importer, sources familiar with the matter said.The allocations…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. Coast Guard Announces Alaska Homeport for Two Arctic Security Cutters
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard announced it would homeport its first two Arctic Security Cutters in Kodiak, Alaska with a third Alaska Arctic Security Cutter homeported in Seward when the infrastructure is ready. This follows April’s announcement that…

top_signals.title: Trump names former SEC head Jay Clayton as US intelligence chief

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO will test how Wall Street prices ‘strategic tech’
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX defies typical market buckets, and the IPO will give Wall Street another chance to value "strategic tech" like Palantir.
